commandment: I am the Lord thy God
latin: Non habébis deos aliénos coram me
questions: Have I doubted or denied the truths of the faith?
Have I put my trust in superstition, fortune-telling, or the occult?
Have I received Holy Communion in a state of mortal sin?
Have I neglected my daily prayers?
Have I been ungrateful for God's blessings?

commandment: Thou shalt not take the name of the Lord in vain
latin: Non assúmes nomen Dómini Dei tui in vanum
questions: Have I used God's name irreverently or in anger?
Have I cursed or used profane language?
Have I broken a vow or oath made to God?
Have I used God's name carelessly in conversation?
Have I broken a solemn promise or vow?

commandment: Remember to keep holy the Lord's Day
questions: Have I missed Mass on Sundays or Holy Days without just cause?
Have I done unnecessary servile work on Sundays?
Have I been inattentive or irreverent at Mass?
Have I done unnecessary servile work on Sundays?
Have I failed to keep days of obligation?

commandment: Honour thy father and thy mother
latin: Honóra patrem tuum et matrem tuam
questions: Have I been disobedient or disrespectful to my parents?
Have I neglected my duties to my family?
Have I failed to care for aged or infirm parents?
Have I neglected my duties to my family?
Have I failed to forgive a family member?
Have I borne hatred, anger, or resentment toward anyone?
Have I refused to forgive?
Have I harmed another by word or deed?
Have I given scandal or led others into sin?
Have I given scandal or led others into sin?
Have I entertained impure thoughts willingly?
Have I committed impure acts, alone or with others?
Have I been unfaithful to my state in life?
Have I failed to guard my eyes from impure images?
Have I kept company that occasions sin against purity?
Have I taken what does not belong to me?
Have I damaged another's property?
Have I failed to make restitution for theft?
Have I been dishonest in business?
Have I been wasteful with what God has given me?

commandment: Thou shalt not bear false witness
latin: Non loquéris contra próximum tuum falsum testimónium
questions: Have I lied or deceived others?
Have I engaged in gossip, detraction, or calumny?
Have I rashly judged others?
Have I gossiped about or detracted the reputation of others?
Have I failed to defend someone's good name when I could have?

commandment: Thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's wife
questions: Have I wilfully entertained impure desires toward another?
Have I failed to guard my eyes, imagination, or reading?
Have I entertained impure thoughts deliberately?
Have I failed to dismiss temptations against purity promptly?
Have I placed myself in occasions of sin against this commandment?

commandment: Thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's goods
questions: Have I been envious of what others possess?
Have I been greedy or excessively attached to material things?
Have I been envious of others' success or good fortune?
Have I been discontented with my state in life?
Have I failed to practice generosity and almsgiving?
